# Three-Pillar Personal Finance Whitepaper

> A free, multilingual personal-finance whitepaper by Nonthawit Doungsodsri. It teaches a simple, lifelong system for building personal finances on one foundational equation — Income − Expenses = Freedom Fund — and three pillars that work together: Cashflow, Investment, and Savings (value preservation). Available in six languages under the MIT License.

Core idea: long-term financial success comes from discipline and following a simple system consistently for five to ten years or more, not from sophisticated strategy. The "Freedom Fund" (money left after expenses) must always flow into the Investment and Savings pillars; the remaining allocation is the reader's to design. DCA (Dollar-Cost Averaging) is offered as one beginner-friendly way to invest, among others.

## Read the whitepaper (PDF)

- [Thai (ไทย)](https://nontravis.github.io/personal-finance-whitepaper/whitepaper-th.pdf): full whitepaper, Thai
- [English](https://nontravis.github.io/personal-finance-whitepaper/whitepaper-en.pdf): full whitepaper, English
- [Spanish (Español)](https://nontravis.github.io/personal-finance-whitepaper/whitepaper-es.pdf): full whitepaper, Spanish
- [Indonesian (Bahasa Indonesia)](https://nontravis.github.io/personal-finance-whitepaper/whitepaper-id.pdf): full whitepaper, Indonesian
- [Simplified Chinese (简体中文)](https://nontravis.github.io/personal-finance-whitepaper/whitepaper-zh.pdf): full whitepaper, Simplified Chinese
- [Japanese (日本語)](https://nontravis.github.io/personal-finance-whitepaper/whitepaper-ja.pdf): full whitepaper, Japanese

## Web summary pages

- [English landing](https://nontravis.github.io/personal-finance-whitepaper/): overview of the three-pillar system with download links
- [Thai landing](https://nontravis.github.io/personal-finance-whitepaper/th/): Thai overview
- [Spanish landing](https://nontravis.github.io/personal-finance-whitepaper/es/): Spanish overview
- [Indonesian landing](https://nontravis.github.io/personal-finance-whitepaper/id/): Indonesian overview
- [Chinese landing](https://nontravis.github.io/personal-finance-whitepaper/zh/): Simplified Chinese overview
- [Japanese landing](https://nontravis.github.io/personal-finance-whitepaper/ja/): Japanese overview

## Use as an AI skill

The whitepaper is also packaged as an AI "reasoning lens" skill that makes any capable AI advise through the Three-Pillar System (Income − Expenses = Freedom Fund; Cashflow, Investment, Savings; discipline over strategy).

- Auto-install in Claude Code (plugin): run `/plugin marketplace add nontravis/personal-finance-whitepaper` then `/plugin install three-pillar-finance@nontravis`. Update with `/plugin marketplace update nontravis` then `/reload-plugins`.
- Auto-install in Claude Code (degit one-liner): `npx degit nontravis/personal-finance-whitepaper/skills/three-pillar-finance ~/.claude/skills/three-pillar-finance` (add `--force` to update).
- [Skill folder (SKILL.md + references)](https://github.com/nontravis/personal-finance-whitepaper/tree/main/skills/three-pillar-finance): for AI agents that read files.
- [Portable single-file lens](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nontravis/personal-finance-whitepaper/main/three-pillar-lens.md): paste into any chatbot's system prompt or custom instructions; re-paste to update.

## Project

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/nontravis/personal-finance-whitepaper): source (LaTeX), build tooling, all editions
- [License (MIT)](https://github.com/nontravis/personal-finance-whitepaper/blob/main/LICENSE): use, share, and adapt with attribution
- [Author](https://nonthawit.com): Nonthawit Doungsodsri
